Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Canada National Parks Act (St. Lawrence Islands National Park of Canada)
Identification.ShortTitle: An Act to amend the Canada National Parks Act (St. Lawrence Islands National Park of Canada)
Identification.RunningHead: Canada National Parks (St. Lawrence Islands National Park of Canada)

Provision.Text: This enactment changes the name of the St. Lawrence Islands National Park of Canada to “Thousand Islands National Park of Canada”.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: The title of subpart (1) of Part 5 of Schedule 1 to the Canada National Parks Act is replaced by the following:

Heading.TitleText: (1) Thousand Islands National Park of Canada
